import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { FileText, FileCheck, FileSpreadsheet, FileCode, ChevronRight, Plus, Link as LinkIcon } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export function LinkedDocumentsPanel({
  currentDocument,
  allDocuments,
  onDocumentClick,
  onAttachDocument,
  canEdit = false
}) {
  const getDocumentIcon = (docType) => {
    switch (docType) {
      case "policy":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "bsh40", _fgB: 1779104383755, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-bsh40": "418.156:418.8813:/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx:24:16:692:32:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {

          lineNumber: 44,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "procedure":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileCheck, _fgS: "bsh41", _fgB: 1779104383755, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-bsh41": "418.156:418.8813:/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx:26:16:765:33:e:FileCheck::::::k3S" }, void 0, false, {

          lineNumber: 46,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "form":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileSpreadsheet, _fgS: "bsh42", _fgB: 1779104383755, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-bsh42": "418.156:418.8813:/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx:28:16:834:39:e:FileSpreadsheet::::::EINS" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx",
          lineNumber: 48,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      case "guideline":
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileCode, _fgS: "bsh43", _fgB: 1779104383755, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-bsh43": "418.156:418.8813:/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx:30:16:914:32:e:FileCode::::::D8SN" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx",
          lineNumber: 50,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
      default:
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "bsh44", _fgB: 1779104383755, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-bsh44": "418.156:418.8813:/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx:32:16:978:32:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx",
          lineNumber: 52,
          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
    }
  };
  const getDocumentTypeColor = (docType) => {
    switch (docType) {
      case "policy":
        return "text-teal-400 bg-teal-500/10";
      case "procedure":
        return "text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10";
      case "form":
        return "text-purple-400 bg-purple-500/10";
      case "guideline":
        return "text-amber-400 bg-amber-500/10";
      default:
        return "text-gray-400 bg-gray-500/10";
    }
  };
  const getDocumentTypeLabel = (docType) => {
    switch (docType) {
      case "policy":
        return "Policy";
      case "procedure":
        return "Procedure";
      case "form":
        return "Form/Template";
      case "guideline":
        return "Guideline";
      default:
        return docType;
    }
  };
  const parentDocument = currentDocument.parentId ? allDocuments.find((doc) => doc.id === currentDocument.parentId) : null;
  const childDocuments = currentDocument.childDocuments ? allDocuments.filter((doc) => currentDocument.childDocuments?.includes(doc.id)) : allDocuments.filter((doc) => doc.parentId === currentDocument.id);
  const linkedForms = currentDocument.linkedForms ? allDocuments.filter((doc) => currentDocument.linkedForms?.includes(doc.id)) : [];
  const renderDocumentLink = (doc, relationship) => /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
    FGCmp,

      _fgT: "div",

_c = LinkedDocumentsPanel;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "LinkedDocumentsPanel");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LinkedDocumentsPanel.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
